entities.name: BUNDELKHAND
entities.description: Region in Central India facing water scarcity, land degradation, and low productivity

entities.name: WATER SCARCITY
entities.description: A condition in Bundelkhand characterized by a lack of sufficient water resources

entities.name: LAND DEGRADATION
entities.description: A condition in Bundelkhand involving the decline of land quality

entities.name: CROPPING INTENSITY
entities.description: A measure of the frequency with which land is cropped, which is low in Bundelkhand

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of crop yield, which is poor in the Bundelkhand region

entities.name: LIVESTOCK PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of output from livestock, which is poor in the Bundelkhand region

entities.name: SOCIO-ECONOMIC STATUS
entities.description: The social and economic standing of the population in Bundelkhand, described as poor

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The primary sector upon which 70% of the Bundelkhand population depends for livelihood

entities.name: ALLIED SECTORS
entities.description: Sectors related to agriculture that support the livelihood of the Bundelkhand population

entities.name: PER CAPITA INCOME
entities.description: The average income per person, which is significantly lower in Bundelkhand than in neighboring states

entities.name: UTTAR PRADESH
entities.description: An Indian state used as a benchmark for per capita income comparison with Bundelkhand

entities.name: MADHYA PRADESH
entities.description: An Indian state used as a benchmark for per capita income comparison with Bundelkhand

entities.name: RAJASTHAN
entities.description: An Indian state used as a benchmark for per capita income comparison with Bundelkhand

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL WATER MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Interventions designed to enhance water availability, cropping intensity, and ecosystem services

entities.name: WATER RESOURCES AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The state of having sufficient water for agricultural use, targeted for enhancement

entities.name: ECOSYSTEM SERVICES
entities.description: The benefits provided by ecosystems, targeted for enhancement through water management
